title: gastrochilus coriaceus
intro: Gastrochilus coriaceus, also known as the hard-leaved orchid, is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to the Himalayan region. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Gastrochilus coriaceus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions, among others. In herbal preparations, Gastrochilus coriaceus is often used to make decoctions, infusions, and powders, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
